title: Rigatoni with French Mushroom Cream Sauce
description: A rich and creamy pasta dish inspired by French cuisine, featuring tender mushrooms and crunchy rigatoni. This dish is perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the rigatoni according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped parsley and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the grated gouda until melted.
Add the heavy cream and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Drain the cooked rigatoni and add it to the skillet with the mushroom sauce.
Toss to combine and serve hot.
